name: wavedash
description: Build browser games, integrate the Wavedash SDK, and prepare builds for upload and publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Build and publish browser games on Wavedash.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through creating browser-playable games, integrating the Wavedash SDK, preparing metadata, and publishing builds to Wavedash.
defaultPrompt: Create a browser game and prepare it for Wavedash.
Integrate the Wavedash SDK into this game.
Prepare this game for Wavedash publishing.
